measurementId.label: Measurement ID
measurementId.description: The Measurement ID associated with a stream. Found in the Google Analytics UI under: Admin > Data Streams > choose your stream > Measurement ID. **Required for web streams.**

firebaseAppId.label: Firebase App ID
firebaseAppId.description: The Firebase App ID associated with the Firebase app. Found in the Firebase console under: Project Settings > General > Your Apps > App ID. **Required for mobile app streams.**

apiSecret.label: API Secret
apiSecret.description: An API SECRET generated in the Google Analytics UI, navigate to: Admin > Data Streams > choose your stream > Measurement Protocol > Create

purchase.title: Purchase
purchase.description: Send event when a user completes a purchase

data_stream_type.label: Data Stream Type
data_stream_type.description: The type of data stream this data belongs in. This can either be a web stream or a mobile app stream (iOS or Android). Possible values: "Web" (default) and "Mobile App".

app_instance_id.label: Firebase App Instance ID
app_instance_id.description: Uniquely identifies a specific installation of a Firebase app. This value needs to be retrieved through the Firebase SDK. **Required for mobile app streams.**

client_id.label: Client ID
client_id.description: Uniquely identifies a user instance of a web client. **Required for web streams.**

user_id.label: User ID
user_id.description: A unique identifier for a user. See Google's [User-ID for cross-platform analysis](https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/9213390) and [Reporting: deduplicate user counts](https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/9355949?hl=en) documentation for more information on this identifier.

timestamp_micros.label: Event Timestamp
timestamp_micros.description: A Unix timestamp (in microseconds) for the time to associate with the event. Segment will convert to Unix if not already converted. Events can be backdated up to 3 calendar days based on the property's timezone.

affiliation.label: Affiliation
affiliation.description: Store or affiliation from which this transaction occurred (e.g. Google Store).

coupon.label: Coupon
coupon.description: Coupon code used for a purchase.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: Currency of the items associated with the event, in 3-letter ISO 4217 format.

item_id.label: Product ID
item_id.description: Identifier for the product being purchased.

item_name.label: Name
item_name.description: Name of the product being purchased.

affiliation.label: Affiliation
affiliation.description: A product affiliation to designate a supplying company or brick and mortar store location.

coupon.label: Coupon
coupon.description: Coupon code used for a purchase.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: Currency of the purchase or items associated with the event, in 3-letter ISO 4217 format.

discount.label: Discount
discount.description: Monetary value of discount associated with a purchase.

index.label: Index
index.description: The index/position of the item in a list.

item_list_id.label: Item List ID
item_list_id.description: The ID of the list in which the item was presented to the user.

item_list_name.label: Item List Name
item_list_name.description: The name of the list in which the item was presented to the user.

location_id.label: Location ID
location_id.description: The location associated with the item.

price.label: Price
price.description: Price of the product being purchased, in units of the specified currency parameter.

transaction_id.label: Order Id
transaction_id.description: The unique identifier of a transaction.

shipping.label: Shipping
shipping.description: Shipping cost associated with the transaction.

tax.label: Tax
tax.description: Total tax associated with the transaction.

value.label: Value
value.description: The monetary value of the event.

user_properties.label: User Properties
user_properties.description: The user properties to send to Google Analytics 4. You must create user-scoped dimensions to ensure custom properties are picked up by Google. See Google’s [Custom user properties](https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/9269570) to learn how to set and register user properties.

engagement_time_msec.label: Engagement Time in Milliseconds
engagement_time_msec.description: The amount of time a user interacted with your site, in milliseconds. Google only counts users who interact with your site for a non-zero amount of time. By default, Segment sets engagement time to 1 so users are counted.

params.label: Event Parameters
params.description: The event parameters to send to Google Analytics 4.

ad_user_data_consent.label: Ad User Data Consent State
ad_user_data_consent.description: Sets consent for sending user data to Google for advertising purposes. Must be either GRANTED or DENIED.

ad_personalization_consent.label: Ad Personalization Consent State
ad_personalization_consent.description: Sets consent for personalized advertising. Must be either GRANTED or DENIED.

addToCart.title: Add to Cart
addToCart.description: Send event when a user adds items to a cart

app_instance_id.label: Firebase App Instance ID

timestamp_micros.label: Event Timestamp
timestamp_micros.description: A Unix timestamp (in microseconds) for the time to associate with the event. Segment will convert to Unix if not already converted. Events can be backdated up to 3 calendar days based on the property's timezone.

name.label: Event Name
name.description: The unique name of the custom event created in GA4. GA4 does not accept spaces in event names so Segment will replace any spaces with underscores. More information about GA4 event name rules is available in [their docs](https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/10085872?hl=en&ref_topic=9756175#event-name-rules&zippy=%2Cin-this-article.%2Cin-this-article).

lowercase.label: Lowercase Event Name
lowercase.description: If true, the event name will be converted to lowercase before sending to Google. Event names are case sensitive in GA4 so enable this setting to avoid distinct events for casing differences. More information about GA4 event name rules is available in [their docs](https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/10085872?hl=en&ref_topic=9756175#event-name-rules&zippy=%2Cin-this-article.%2Cin-this-article).

user_properties.label: User Properties
user_properties.description: The user properties to send to Google Analytics 4. You must create user-scoped dimensions to ensure custom properties are picked up by Google. See Google’s [Custom user properties](https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/9269570) to learn how to set and register user properties.

app_instance_id.description: Uniquely identifies a specific installation of a Firebase app. This value needs to be retrieved through the Firebase SDK. **Required for mobile app streams.**

client_id.label: Client ID
client_id.description: Uniquely identifies a user instance of a web client. **Required for web streams.**

user_id.label: User ID
user_id.description: A unique identifier for a user. See Google's [User-ID for cross-platform analysis](https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/9213390) and [Reporting: deduplicate user counts](https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/9355949?hl=en) documentation for more information on this identifier.

timestamp_micros.label: Event Timestamp
timestamp_micros.description: A Unix timestamp (in microseconds) for the time to associate with the event. Segment will convert to Unix if not already converted. Events can be backdated up to 3 calendar days based on the property's timezone.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: Currency of the items associated with the event, in 3-letter ISO 4217 format.

value.label: Value
value.description: The monetary value of the event.

item_id.label: Product ID
item_id.description: Identifier for the product being purchased.

item_name.label: Name
item_name.description: Name of the product being purchased.

affiliation.label: Affiliation
affiliation.description: A product affiliation to designate a supplying company or brick and mortar store location.

coupon.label: Coupon
coupon.description: Coupon code used for a purchase.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: Currency of the purchase or items associated with the event, in 3-letter ISO 4217 format.

discount.label: Discount
discount.description: Monetary value of discount associated with a purchase.

index.label: Index
index.description: The index/position of the item in a list.

item_list_id.label: Item List ID
item_list_id.description: The ID of the list in which the item was presented to the user.

item_list_name.label: Item List Name
item_list_name.description: The name of the list in which the item was presented to the user.

location_id.label: Location ID
location_id.description: The location associated with the item.

price.label: Price
price.description: Price of the product being purchased, in units of the specified currency parameter.

user_properties.label: User Properties
user_properties.description: The user properties to send to Google Analytics 4. You must create user-scoped dimensions to ensure custom properties are picked up by Google. See Google’s [Custom user properties](https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/9269570) to learn how to set and register user properties.

engagement_time_msec.label: Engagement Time in Milliseconds
engagement_time_msec.description: The amount of time a user interacted with your site, in milliseconds. Google only counts users who interact with your site for a non-zero amount of time. By default, Segment sets engagement time to 1 so users are counted.

ad_personalization_consent.description: Sets consent for personalized advertising. Must be either GRANTED or DENIED.

engagement_time_msec.description: The amount of time a user interacted with your site, in milliseconds. Google only counts users who interact with your site for a non-zero amount of time. By default, Segment sets engagement time to 1 so users are counted.

params.label: Event Parameters
params.description: The event parameters to send to Google Analytics 4.

ad_user_data_consent.label: Ad User Data Consent State
ad_user_data_consent.description: Sets consent for sending user data to Google for advertising purposes. Must be either GRANTED or DENIED.

ad_personalization_consent.label: Ad Personalization Consent State
ad_personalization_consent.description: Sets consent for personalized advertising. Must be either GRANTED or DENIED.

generateLead.title: Generate Lead
generateLead.description: Send event when a user submits a form or request for information

data_stream_type.label: Data Stream Type
data_stream_type.description: The type of data stream this data belongs in. This can either be a web stream or a mobile app stream (iOS or Android). Possible values: "Web" (default) and "Mobile App".

app_instance_id.label: Firebase App Instance ID
app_instance_id.description: Uniquely identifies a specific installation of a Firebase app. This value needs to be retrieved through the Firebase SDK. **Required for mobile app streams.**

client_id.label: Client ID
client_id.description: Uniquely identifies a user instance of a web client. **Required for web streams.**

user_id.label: User ID
user_id.description: A unique identifier for a user. See Google's [User-ID for cross-platform analysis](https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/9213390) and [Reporting: deduplicate user counts](https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/9355949?hl=en) documentation for more information on this identifier.

timestamp_micros.label: Event Timestamp
timestamp_micros.description: A Unix timestamp (in microseconds) for the time to associate with the event. Segment will convert to Unix if not already converted. Events can be backdated up to 3 calendar days based on the property's timezone.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: Currency of the items associated with the event, in 3-letter ISO 4217 format.

value.label: Value
value.description: The monetary value of the event.

user_properties.label: User Properties
user_properties.description: The user properties to send to Google Analytics 4. You must create user-scoped dimensions to ensure custom properties are picked up by Google. See Google’s [Custom user properties](https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/9269570) to learn how to set and register user properties.

engagement_time_msec.label: Engagement Time in Milliseconds
engagement_time_msec.description: The amount of time a user interacted with your site, in milliseconds. Google only counts users who interact with your site for a non-zero amount of time. By default, Segment sets engagement time to 1 so users are counted.

params.label: Event Parameters
params.description: The event parameters to send to Google Analytics 4.

ad_user_data_consent.label: Ad User Data Consent State
ad_user_data_consent.description: Sets consent for sending user data to Google for advertising purposes. Must be either GRANTED or DENIED.

ad_personalization_consent.label: Ad Personalization Consent State
ad_personalization_consent.description: Sets consent for personalized advertising. Must be either GRANTED or DENIED.

addToWishlist.title: Add to Wishlist
addToWishlist.description: Send event when a user adds items to a wishlist
addToWishlist.defaultSubscription: type = "track" and event = "Product Added to Wishlist"

data_stream_type.description: The type of data stream this data belongs in. This can either be a web stream or a mobile app stream (iOS or Android). Possible values: "Web" (default) and "Mobile App".

app_instance_id.label: Firebase App Instance ID
app_instance_id.description: Uniquely identifies a specific installation of a Firebase app. This value needs to be retrieved through the Firebase SDK. **Required for mobile app streams.**

client_id.label: Client ID
client_id.description: Uniquely identifies a user instance of a web client. **Required for web streams.**

user_id.label: User ID
user_id.description: A unique identifier for a user. See Google's [User-ID for cross-platform analysis](https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/9213390) and [Reporting: deduplicate user counts](https://support.google.com/analytics/answer/9355949?hl=en) documentation for more information on this identifier.

timestamp_micros.label: Event Timestamp
timestamp_micros.description: A Unix timestamp (in microseconds) for the time to associate with the event. Segment will convert to Unix if not already converted. Events can be backdated up to 3 calendar days based on the property's timezone.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: Currency of the items associated with the event, in 3-letter ISO 4217 format.

value.label: Value
value.description: The monetary value of the event.

item_id.label: Product ID
item_id.description: Identifier for the product being purchased.

item_name.label: Name
item_name.description: Name of the product being purchased.

affiliation.label: Affiliation
affiliation.description: A product affiliation to designate a supplying company or brick and mortar store location.

coupon.label: Coupon
coupon.description: Coupon code used for a purchase.

currency.label: Currency
currency.description: Currency of the purchase or items associated with the event, in 3-letter ISO 4217 format.

discount.label: Discount
discount.description: Monetary value of discount associated with a purchase.

index.label: Index
index.description: The index/position of the item in a list.

item_list_id.label: Item List ID
item_list_id.description: The ID of the list in which the item was presented to the user.

item_list_name.label: Item List Name
item_list_name.description: The name of the list in which the item was presented to the user.

location_id.label: Location ID
location_id.description: The location associated with the item.

price.label: Price
price.description: Price of the product being purchased, in units of the specified currency parameter.
